screen_paper.description: Paper rejected if any required dim score < 3 (score 1-5 scale; 1 = not described at all)

pipeline1_analyze_paper.description: Category ineligible if any required dim score <= 3 (must be > 3).

pipeline2_extract_excerpt.description: Category filtered if learner_count = 0 OR instruction_count = 0

scenario.description: Recommended number of scenarios per student category in Pipeline 3 (not enforced)
